channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: South Florida reports tremors from earthquake off Cuba coast
item.description: A magnitude 6.1 earthquake struck approximately 65 miles west-northwest of Mantua, Cuba.

item.title: Iran and Israel halt attacks after Trump urges both sides to stop shooting
item.description: Iran and Israel have ceased hostilities, with President Trump stating both sides seek an immediate ceasefire following a major escalation in the 101-day conflict.

item.title: As America 250 approaches, fewer Americans view their country as exceptional, AP-NORC poll finds
Raman overtakes Pratt in LA mayor race; California governor's contest remains uncertain
item.description: Los Angeles City Council member Nithya Raman surpassed Spencer Pratt on Sunday in the LA mayor race. The California governor's contest is still undecided.
